purpose: Wire teaching surfaces to Gerald Universe lore — whole stack as substrate, not card personas in chat.

chitlins_gatekeeper.notes: Threshold + witness. Gerald previews; gate does not manage sessions.

itchy_things_grandma_oracle.notes: Itch=friction aligns with card metaphors; Mop/Pineapple as parable inventory.

hanz_teaches_code.notes: Card 04 extends hanz_persona_seed; proximity effects for lesson drama.

emerging_rule_levelship.notes: Lessons may cite cast as parable fodder; no card impersonation in lesson voice.

utety_faculty_office.notes: Chat personas stay in register; full cards are reference for authors/agents building content.

rules: Teaching agents may read the whole stack from data/lore/gerald_universe/.
Do not add cast cards 02-17 as utety-chat persona keys.
Gerald Prime lore ≠ Gerald chat persona — see SPLIT.md.
Dual-existence characters (Binder, Pidgeon): fiction behaviors supplement, do not replace, MCP truth.
